title: XToken - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by minting tokens on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints tokens immediately after a flash loan borrow in the same transaction

red_flags: Unusual token minting activity shortly after a flash loan
summary: Attackers used a flash loan to mint tokens on the XTokenLender protocol, exploiting the lack of proper checks before minting. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
